keyPoints: A servlet receives parameters from the client in the request object's getParameter() method or getParameterNames() and getParameterValues() methods.

There are two types of parameters: request parameters and session parameters. Request parameters are passed from the client to the servlet, while session parameters are stored in the server-side session object.
To read a servlet parameter, you can use the following methods: getParameter(), getParameterNames(), and getParameterValues().
